title: Payroll — Employee and Employer Entries
event: Reyes Co.'s employee earns gross pay of $4,000. Withholdings: FICA taxes of $306 (7.65%) and federal income tax of $480. Employer payroll taxes: FICA match $306, FUTA $24 (0.6%), SUTA $216 (5.4%). Prepare both payroll entries.

lines.label: gross pay
lines.why: The expense is GROSS — the full cost of the labor, before any withholding.
lines.trap: Debiting net pay (3,214) understates the expense; withholdings are still the company's cost of labor.

lines.label: employee's 7.65%
lines.why: Withheld from the employee, owed to the government.
lines.trap: Withholdings are LIABILITIES — the company is holding someone else's money.

lines.label: federal withholding
lines.why: Income tax withheld on the employee's behalf.
lines.trap: Not the company's tax expense — it's the employee's tax, briefly parked.

lines.label: net pay
lines.trap: Net pay is the plug — if it isn't gross minus every withholding, a line is missing.

lines.label: employer's own burden
lines.why: The employer's ADDITIONAL cost on top of gross pay: FICA match + FUTA + SUTA.
lines.trap: This is a second, separate expense — total labor cost is 4,546, not 4,000.

lines.label: employer match
lines.why: The employer matches the employee's FICA dollar for dollar.
lines.trap: Two FICA credits exist across the two entries — one withheld, one matched.

lines.label: FUTA 0.6%
lines.trap: Employees never pay FUTA/SUTA — these appear ONLY in the employer entry.

lines.label: SUTA 5.4%
lines.trap: Unemployment taxes apply to a wage base cap in practice — exams usually hand you the amounts.

memorize.body: Two entries, two hats: entry 1 records the employee's pay (gross → withholdings → net); entry 2 records the employer's OWN taxes.
FICA shows up twice on purpose — withheld from the employee AND matched by the employer.

questions.prompt: Gross pay $4,000, FICA withheld $306, income tax withheld $480. NET pay = ?

distractors.feedback: That's GROSS. Net pay is what survives the withholdings: 4,000 − 306 − 480 = 3,214.
You also subtracted the employer's taxes. FUTA/SUTA and the FICA match never reduce the employee's check.

build.scaffold: Entry 1: gross expense, withholding payables, net pay plug. Entry 2: employer's tax expense against three payables.
